word: H1920 - הָדַף - Hâdaph - haw-daf' - Cast away

sections.paragraph:
Original: הדף

Transliteration: hâdaph

Phonetic: haw-daf'

BDB Definition:

  1. to thrust, push, drive, cast away, cast out, expel, thrust away
    1. (Qal)
      1. to thrust, push
      2. to drive out, thrust out
      3. to depose

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 476

Part(s) of speech: Verb
